title: <div><tt>+| **Pragmatic** | Interprets context, speech acts and dialog state; re
content:
+| **Pragmatic** | Interprets context, speech acts and dialog state; resolves coreference and manages implicature【33635101037775†L157-L168】. |
+| **Discourse** | Models coherence, argumentation and narrative flow through hierarchical graphs (e.g., enhanced RST)【33635101037775†L167-L170】. |
+| **Sociolinguistic** | Tracks dialect, register and power dynamics to ensure outputs match social context【33635101037775†L171-L182】. |
+| **Interface** | Exposes RAW and PUBLIC modes and provides a visual IDE for analysis and generation【33635101037775†L253-L272】. |
+
+Each layer can operate independently yet interacts with its neighbours through upward, downward and lateral flows. *Upward flows* progressively abstract raw input; *downward flows* allow high‑level interpretations to inform lower‑level analysis (e.g., semantics influencing phonology); and *lateral flows* enable phenomena such as sound symbolism【3†L47-L67】. The architecture is visualised below:
+
+![Layered architecture of RLOS]({{file:file-6ZqwXiqkC3U1VDZGnQbixf}})
+
